feed.title: celestialhuntress
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from celestialhuntress

entry.title: Can yall tell that im slowly losing it? One of them asked what it was like to be in my forties… #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Can yall tell that im slowly losing it? One of them asked what it was like to be in my forties… #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Disclaimer: not effective if you ain’t autistic #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Disclaimer: not effective if you ain’t autistic #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Ah fuck the accent there just kinda jumped out huh? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Ah fuck the accent there just kinda jumped out huh? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: It makes me wanna chew through bone, why would you come back?? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: It makes me wanna chew through bone, why would you come back?? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Theres no easy solution cause if im buying clothes i want my clothes to be hot girl shit #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Theres no easy solution cause if im buying clothes i want my clothes to be hot girl shit #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: They said i had to post this
entry.content: They said i had to post this

entry.title: A small number of them now call me Mom-yari i dont know what to do with this #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: A small number of them now call me Mom-yari i dont know what to do with this #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Like babes if I, the queen of forgetting meds, can do it so can you #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Like babes if I, the queen of forgetting meds, can do it so can you #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Honestly kinda forgot i even made content #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
